synthesis.driver: Escalating US-Iran tensions over Hormuz attacks are lifting Brent, but oversupply limits gains.
synthesis.based_on: Oil price rises above $95 mark as Middle East conflict escalates

takes.oil price rises above 95 mark as middle: Escalation in Middle East conflict is driving oil prices higher.
takes.trump warns iran any attack in strait of: US threats of strikes on Iran add to the war-risk premium on oil.
takes.iran war updates oil back near 95 a barr: Attacks in Hormuz keep the war premium elevated despite the strait remaining open.
takes.trump vows us will strike bridges power: US vows of retaliation against Iran sustain upward pressure on oil prices.
